name: integration_i_lost_2300_on_my_first_amazon_private
method: I lost $2,300 on my first Amazon Private Label product. Here's the exact mistake that killed it.

phases.name: extract_hooks
steps: parse loss story format into hook template
extract specific dollar amount and mistake type
generate 3 niche variants (tech: 'I lost $X on my first SaaS', faith: 'I lost $X on my first faith app', fitness: 'I lost $X on my first supplement brand')

phases.name: generate_content
steps: run content_multiplier.py for cross-platform variants (twitter thread, reddit post, linkedin story)
